config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 25/07/2024
		Purpose: Initiate Repair/Rework operation 
	"""
	try:
	    if (str(self.props.text) != 'null' and str(self.props.text) != '') and str(event.key) == 'Enter':
	        serialNumber = str(self.props.text)
	        params = {'SerialNumber': serialNumber}
	        system.perspective.print("params " + str(params))
	        result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/Rework/getReworkData", params)
	        length = len(system.dataset.toPyDataSet(result))
	        system.perspective.print("params " + str(params) + ' len ' + str(length))
	        if length != 0:
	            orderNumber = result.getValueAt(0, "OrderNumber")
	            serialNumber = result.getValueAt(0, "SerialNumber")
	            bomNumber = result.getValueAt(0, "BOMNumber")
	            model = result.getValueAt(0, "Model")
	            areaId = result.getValueAt(0, "AreaId")
	            operation = result.getValueAt(0, "Operation")
	            testBedStatus = result.getValueAt(0, "TestBedStatus")
	            bomId = result.getValueAt(0, "BomId")
	            self.view.custom.bomId  = bomId
	            self.view.custom.serialNumber =serialNumber
	            self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTestBedStatus").getChild("CoordinateContainer").getChild("lblQG_value").props.text = testBedStatus
	            self.view.custom.Operation = operation
	            self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOrderNumber").getChild("TextField").props.text = orderNumber
	            self.view.custom.serialNumber = serialNumber
	            self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOM").getChild("TextField").props.text = bomNumber
	            self.parent.parent.getChild("cntModel").getChild("txtModel").props.text = model
	            self.view.custom.areaId = areaId
	            system.perspective.print("areaId " + str(self.view.custom.areaId) + " serialNumber " + str(serialNumber))
	            system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshQGData")
	            if str(operation) == 'Invalid':
	                message = 'Serial Number is not Valid for Repair and Rework'
	                state = "fail"
	                Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
	            else:
	                if str(operation) == 'Rework':
	                    eventId = 10
	                else:
	                    eventId = 14
	                popup_id = 'Rework'
	                view_path = 'Project_VECV/PopUp/OperatorDashBoard/Rework/StartStop'
	                params = {"message": "Do you want to Start " + str(operation), "serialNumber": serialNumber, "eventId": int(eventId), 'bomId': bomId}
	                system.perspective.openPopup(popup_id, view_path, params=params, resizable=True, modal=False, draggable=False, header=False,showCloseIcon=False)
	        else:
	            message = 'Serial Number is not Valid for Repair and Rework'
	            state = "fail"
	            Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
	except:
	    screenName = 'Rework'
	    filePath = 'Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/Rework Station'
	    errorFunction = 'Event:onAction -> OnKeyPress'
	    errorType = 'Application'
	    errorCode = Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()
	    description = str(sys.exc_info()[1])  # Error description
	    lineNumber = str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno)  # Line number on which error occurred
	    Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName, filePath, errorFunction, errorType, errorCode, description, lineNumber)
	    system.perspective.print("lineNumber " + str(lineNumber) + str(errorCode) + str(description))

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	self.focus()
	system.perspective.print('Serial number focus')

# implement your handler here
	self.refreshBinding('props.instances')
	system.perspective.print("areaId from refresh" +str(self.view.custom.areaId)+" serialNumber " +str(serialNumber))

config.script:
# Get the table data
	try:
		operation = self.view.custom.Operation
		if str(operation) == 'Rework':
		    eventId = 11
		else:
		    eventId = 15
		serialNumber = self.view.custom.serialNumber
		bomId = self.view.custom.bomId
		popup_id = 'Rework'
		view_path = 'Project_VECV/PopUp/OperatorDashBoard/Rework/StartStop'
		params = {"message": "Do you want to Stop " + str(operation), "serialNumber": serialNumber, "eventId": int(eventId), 'bomId': bomId}
		system.perspective.openPopup(popup_id, view_path, params=params, resizable=True, modal=False, draggable=False, header=False,showCloseIcon=False)

	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Rework'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Rework')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:ActionPerformed  -> btnStop')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar

	system.perspective.sendMessage('SerialNumberFocus',scope = 'page' )

	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTestBedStatus").getChild("CoordinateContainer").getChild("lblQG_value").props.text =''
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntOrderNumber").getChild("TextField").props.text = ''
	self.view.custom.serialNumber = ''
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntBOM").getChild("TextField").props.text = ''
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntModel").getChild("txtModel").props.text =''
	self.view.custom.Operation =''

messageHandlers.script:

	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntSerialNumber").getChild("SerialScanID").props.text = ''
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTestBedStatus").getChild("CoordinateContainer").getChild("lblQG_value").props.text =''

	self.view.custom.serialNumber = ''
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntBOM").getChild("TextField").props.text = ''
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntModel").getChild("txtModel").props.text =''
